text.title: ddd-repositories Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ddd-repositories as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: TBD — v1 source contained no antipatterns. Document at least one LLM failure mode for this methodology.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable check for the failure
failure-mode.repair: TBD — corrective action when detector fires
